arguments.old_string:
tracing:
  enabled: true
  exporter: otlp
  otlp:
    endpoint: http://localhost:9999
    headers:

arguments.new_string:

  enabled: true
  exporter: otlp
  sampling_ratio: 0.5

    endpoint: http://localhost:9999
    headers:
      api-key: test-key
